name: Spring Green Potato Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 large Russet potato, peeled and cut into 1-in cubes
1 large Sweet potato, peeled and cut into 1-in cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a 3-quart saucepan over medium-high heat.
2. When hot, add onion and cook until softened, about 4 minutes, stirring often.
3. Add all potatoes and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
4. Add chicken stock (or broth), dillweed, and cayenne. Bring to a boil.
5. Simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
6. Add peas and lettuce. Cook until potatoes and peas are completely tender, about 5 minutes.
7. Puree soup in a food processor with the metal blade until smooth, about 2 minutes.
8. Return to pan. Thin as desired with remaining stock or broth.
9. Adjust seasoning. The soup is bright green when freshly made; the color lightens on storage but remains appealing.
10. Can be made up to 3 days ahead and refrigerated. It can also be frozen for up to 3 months. Serve hot or chilled. Makes 6 1/2 Cups
